releases.summary: Fix: timer bombed with "A.effort is not iterable" when rehydrating a pre-v6 persisted session.
changes: fix(timer): normalize pre-v6 persisted sessions on rehydrate — session snapshot + every HistoricalRecording coerced to effort: EffortItem[]
fix(timer): _rehydrateFromStorageForTests now routes through zustand's real persist.rehydrate() so migrate + onRehydrateStorage actually run
test(timer): regression test covers three legacy shapes + asserts spreading effort does not throw

releases.summary: Versioning system live. Bottom-left badge shows version + environment, tooltip shows change summary.
changes: feat(version): systematic release metadata in public/version.json
feat(version): hover tooltip renders current release summary + changes
feat(version): scripts/release.mjs bumps version + captures git log
